title: Consolidated publication version of the Treaty concerning the Accession of the Kingdom of Denmark, Ireland, the Kingdom of Norway and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland to the European Economic Community and the European Atomic Energy Community including the Act concerning the Conditions of Accession and the Adjustments to the Treaties as amended by the Decision of the Council of 1 January 1973 adjusting the instruments concerned the accession of new Member States to the European Communities and Decision of the Council of 21 April 1970 on Financial Contributions, Brussels, 22 January 1972
subject: EUROPEAN COMMUNITIES (EC)
